metadata: {"sender":"ai","content":"A dose of **100mg/week** of testosterone is a common starting point for **TRT** and often aims to bring total **Testosterone** into the mid-to-upper physiological range for many individuals. {"sender":"ai","content":"Your **Neutrophils** are significantly low at **0.38 10^9/L** (ref: **2–7.5 10^9/L**) ⚠ OUT OF RANGE. Neutrophils are a type of white blood cell crucial for fighting bacterial and fungal infections, so a low count (neutropenia) can indicate a compromised immune system or an underlying issue. This is compounded by your overall **White Blood Cells** being low at **2.79 10^9/L** (ref: **3–11 10^9/L**) ⚠ OUT OF RANGE.\n\n⚕️ Always consult a licensed healthcare professional before changing your protocol.","characterCount":502,"conversationId":"d8e3cfa3-4357-4e7b-aea1-b8756cbf6be6"}
